action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Discussion Regarding Compensation and Career Growth

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to request a meeting to discuss my current role and compensation. Over the past [Number] years, I have been deeply committed to the success of our team and the company. During this time, I have taken on additional responsibilities, successfully led [mention specific project or initiative], and consistently exceeded my performance targets, as evidenced by [mention specific metric or achievement].

Given these contributions and the current market standards for my level of expertise, I believe it is appropriate to review my salary. I am confident that my continued dedication and the value I bring to the organization make me a strong candidate for this adjustment.

Please let me know if you have some time available next week to discuss this further. I am eager to continue contributing to our shared goals and would appreciate the opportunity to align my compensation with my current contributions.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

P.P.S. I have also attached a brief summary of my key achievements for your reference.

Hope you agree with me.
action.label: response
